---
title: "PBC Container Index"
sidebar: false
---

</p>

[Switch to Russian](pbc-container-index.qmd)

**PBC Container Index** — a composite index reflecting the cost of container transportation along the most popular container cargo import route to Russia. It is calculated based on the weighted average spot rates for the transportation of a FEU container owned by the carrier, loaded onto a ship or railway in Shanghai (FI / FOR Shanghai), to the recipient's warehouse in Moscow (FOT Moscow) along four routes: through the ports of Vladivostok, St. Petersburg and Novorossiysk, as well as by direct rail.

**PBC Container Index as of September 15, 2025: $5 084** [(**-1%** m/m; **-43%** y/y)]{.my-custom-class style="color:#f6514c;"}.


```{r, warning = FALSE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}

library(openxlsx)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(highcharter)
library(stringr)

colors <- c("#1a4afc", "#28055a", "#6d7aa5", "#82096c", "#d1e5ff",
            "#44bf78", "#f6514c", "#FF9500", "#c3b0ef", "#d0d0d0",
            "#ffffff", "#000000")

# Read Excel
path <- "xls/Расчетная модель_ЦЦИ_Контейнерный индекс.xlsm"
raw  <- openxlsx::read.xlsx(path, sheet = "Расчет", colNames = FALSE, detectDates = FALSE)

# Header row with field names
hdr_row <- 4L
stopifnot(identical(as.character(raw[[1]][hdr_row]), "Показатель"))

# Convert Excel serials to Date for column names
date_cols  <- as.Date(as.numeric(unlist(raw[hdr_row, -(1:2)], use.names = FALSE)),
                      origin = "1899-12-30")
date_names <- format(date_cols, "%Y-%m-%d")
names(raw) <- c("Показатель", "Ед.", date_names)

# Data rows
dat <- raw[(hdr_row + 1L):nrow(raw), ]

# Tidy
tidy <- dat %>%
  mutate(across(-c(Показатель, Ед.), ~ suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -c(Показатель, Ед.),
               names_to = "date", values_to = "value") %>%
  mutate(
    date  = as.Date(date),
    value = ifelse(value == 0, NA, value) # empty cells -> NA
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(value)) %>%
  arrange(Показатель, date)

# Choose series (keep names from the data)
series_order <- c(
  "Контейнерный индекс ЦЦИ",
  "FI Шанхай – Владивосток (Находка) – FOR Москва – FOT Москва",
  "FOR Шанхай – FOR Москва – FOT Москва",
  "FI Шанхай – Санкт-Петербург – FOT Москва",
  "FI Шанхай – Новороссийск – FOT Москва"
)

series_labels <- list(
  "Контейнерный индекс ЦЦИ" = "PBC Container Index",
  "FI Шанхай – Владивосток (Находка) – FOR Москва – FOT Москва" =
    "FI Shanghai – Vladivostok (Nakhodka) – FOR Moscow – FOT Moscow",
  "FOR Шанхай – FOR Москва – FOT Москва" =
    "FOR Shanghai – FOR Moscow – FOT Moscow",
  "FI Шанхай – Санкт-Петербург – FOT Москва" =
    "FI Shanghai – St. Petersburg – FOT Moscow",
  "FI Шанхай – Новороссийск – FOT Москва" =
    "FI Shanghai – Novorossiysk – FOT Moscow"
)

series_exist <- intersect(series_order, unique(tidy$Показатель))
plot_data    <- tidy %>% filter(Показатель %in% series_exist)

plot_data = plot_data[format(plot_data$date, '%Y') >= 2023,] # данные только после 2023 года

# Chart
hc <- highchart() |>
  hc_chart(type = "spline") |>
  hc_title(text = "PBC Container Index") |>
  hc_colors(colors) |>
  hc_xAxis(
    type = "datetime",
    labels = list(format = "{value:%m.%Y}")
  ) |>
  hc_yAxis(
    title = list(text = "USD/FEU"),
    labels = list(format = "{value:,.0f}"),
    gridLineDashStyle = "ShortDash"
  ) |>
  # Tooltip also in thousands
  hc_tooltip(
    shared = FALSE, useHTML = TRUE,
    headerFormat = "<span style='font-size:11px'>{point.series.name}</span><br/>",
    pointFormatter = JS(
      "function(){ return '<b>' +
         Highcharts.numberFormat(this.y/1, 0, '.', ' ') +
         '</b><br/><span>' + Highcharts.dateFormat('%d.%m.%Y', this.x) + '</span>'; }"
    )
  ) |>
  hc_legend(layout = "horizontal", align = "center", verticalAlign = "bottom") |>
  hc_exporting(enabled = FALSE) |>
  hc_credits(enabled = TRUE, text = "PBC", href = "https://pbc-index.ru/")

for (s in series_exist) {
  is_index <- identical(s, "Контейнерный индекс ЦЦИ")
  df_s <- plot_data |>
    dplyr::filter(Показатель == s) |>
    dplyr::arrange(date) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      y = dplyr::if_else(value == 0, NA_real_, value),
      x = highcharter::datetime_to_timestamp(date)
    )

  # берём перевод или оставляем исходное имя
  name_en <- if (!is.null(series_labels[[s]])) series_labels[[s]] else s

  hc <- hc |>
    hc_add_series(
      data      = highcharter::list_parse2(df_s[, c("x", "y")]),
      name      = name_en,                  # <-- чистая строка, без имени
      type      = "spline",
      lineWidth = if (is_index) 2 else 2,
      dashStyle = if (is_index) "Solid" else "ShortDash",
      visible   = is_index,
      marker    = list(enabled = FALSE),
      states    = list(hover = list(lineWidth = if (is_index) 3 else 2)),
      connectNulls = FALSE
    )
}
hc

```


------------------------------------------------------------------------

**The PBC Container Index** is an independent operational indicator for assessing the cost of container cargo imports, as well as the general state of the transport and logistics services market in the China-Russia corridor. The PBC container index reflects the dynamics of spot rates for transport and logistics services for the delivery of container cargo from China, Russia's largest foreign trade partner, which accounts for up to 40% of the value of commodity imports, as well as up to 80% of container cargo imports.


------------------------------------------------------------------------

### [Monthly overview]{.my-custom-class style="color:#1a4afc;"}

September 15, 2025. PBC Container price index. **September fails to meet expectations for container market growth**

[Materials -\>](reports/2025-09%20Контейнерный%20индекс%20ЦЦИ.pdf)

### [Methodology]{.my-custom-class style="color:#1a4afc;"}

[PBC Container index methodology -\>](pdf/PBC%20Container%20Index%20Methodology.pdf)
